name: mnemo-cortex
description: Persistent memory for Claude. Save, search, and recall across sessions. Works with any Mnemo Cortex server (local or hosted).
long_description:
Mnemo Cortex gives Claude a persistent semantic memory layer that survives across sessions. This bundle registers 9 tools by default (4 memory + 5 Developer's Passport). Up to 8 additional tools (brain-lane CRUD, wiki search, session lifecycle) auto-register at startup if matching directories are found on disk via the optional `BRAIN_DIR` and `WIKI_DIR` env vars — this is what `tools_generated: true` reflects below.

You need a running Mnemo Cortex server — locally, in Docker, or somewhere reachable on your network. See https://github.com/GuyMannDude/mnemo-cortex for the server install.

Free, self-hosted, fully private. Same memory across Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Ollama, LM Studio, and any other MCP host.

mnemo_url.title: Mnemo Cortex Server URL
mnemo_url.description: Where your Mnemo Cortex server is running. Use http://localhost:50001 if you're running it on the same machine, or the address of your network instance.

agent_id.title: Agent ID
agent_id.description: How this Claude session identifies itself in your memory store. Use a distinct ID per host (e.g., 'claude-desktop', 'claude-code') so memories don't collide.

share_mode.title: Cross-Agent Sharing
share_mode.description: 'separate' restricts mnemo_search to your own agent's memories. 'always' lets you read across all agents (good for personal multi-host setups). 'never' permanently disables cross-agent search.

tools.name: mnemo_recall
tools.description: Recall memories from your own agent's lane. Semantic search.

tools.name: mnemo_search
tools.description: Search memories across agents (gated by share_mode).

tools.name: mnemo_save
tools.description: Save a summary or key facts for future recall.

tools.name: mnemo_share
tools.description: Toggle cross-agent search on/off for this session.

tools.name: passport_get_user_context
tools.description: Read the user's portable working-style passport.

tools.name: passport_observe_behavior
tools.description: Record a behavioral observation about the user (review-queued, never auto-promoted).

tools.name: passport_promote_observation
tools.description: Promote a pending observation to a stable claim.

tools.name: passport_forget_or_override
tools.description: Deprecate, forget, or replace a stable claim.

tools.name: opie_startup
tools.description: Conditional (BRAIN_DIR): load brain lane file, recent context, and dream brief at session start.

tools.name: read_brain_file
tools.description: Conditional (BRAIN_DIR): read a markdown file from the brain directory.

tools.name: list_brain_files
tools.description: Conditional (BRAIN_DIR): list markdown files in the brain directory.

tools.name: write_brain_file
tools.description: Conditional (BRAIN_DIR): write or update a brain file. Refuses to write CLAUDE.md or cc-session.md.

tools.name: session_end
tools.description: Conditional (BRAIN_DIR): save final summary to Mnemo, then git add/commit/push the brain dir.

tools.name: wiki_search
tools.description: Conditional (WIKI_DIR): grep-search the local wiki for a phrase.

tools.name: wiki_read
tools.description: Conditional (WIKI_DIR): read a wiki page by relative path.

tools.name: wiki_index
tools.description: Conditional (WIKI_DIR): return the wiki's top-level index.
